key_specs:
• Capacity: 500 VA / 300 W
• Output: 230 V (typical for Ghana/EU markets)
• Battery Type: Sealed Lead‑Acid (maintenance‑free)
• Outlets: Multiple battery‑backup and surge‑protected sockets
• Surge Protection: Yes
• Runtime: Provides several minutes of backup at low load (varies with device)
• Features: Automatic Voltage Regulation (AVR), Power‑on self‑test, LED indicators for status, Audible alarms for power events
description: The APC Back‑UPS 500VA functions as an uninterruptible power supply system, which provides dependable power protection for your computer and network equipment, and home electronic devices against power outages, voltage fluctuations, and power surges. The system maintains power to essential equipment through its battery backup system and automatic voltage regulation, which allows users to complete their work and power down their devices safely.

key_specs:

• Output Voltage: 230 V (suitable for Ghana/EU power systems)
• Battery Type: Sealed Lead‑Acid (maintenance‑free)
• Outlets: Combination of battery‑backup + surge‑protected sockets
• Surge Protection: Yes
• Runtime: Provides minutes of backup power depending on load
• Features: Automatic Voltage Regulation (AVR), LED status indicators, Audible alarms for power events
description: The APC Back-UPS BV 650VA functions as a reliable uninterruptible power supply system that safeguards computers, home networking devices, and electronic equipment from power interruptions, voltage spikes, and power fluctuations. The system provides sufficient battery backup power to enable users to preserve their work and conduct safe device shutdowns.

key_specs:
• Capacity: 800 VA / 480 W
• UPS Type: Line‑Interactive with AVR (Automatic Voltage Regulation)
• Output Voltage: 230 V
• Battery: Sealed Lead‑Acid (VRLA), 12 V 9 Ah
• Outlets: Typically 2 Schuko / C13 outlets, depending on version
• Waveform: Stepped sine / simulated sine
• Features: Cold‑start support, automatic restart, overload, and surge protection
• Form Factor: Tower, compact design
• Use Case: Ideal for PCs, workstations, routers, and small office electronics needing basic battery backup and power conditioning.
description: The Liebert itON 800VA UPS functions as a small yet dependable line-interactive uninterruptible power supply that protects desktop computers, networking equipment, and delicate electronic devices from power outages, voltage spikes, and voltage changes, providing users with time to complete their work and perform proper system shutdown.

description: The APC Back‑UPS 700VA functions as an uninterruptible power supply, which delivers battery backup power together with surge protection to safeguard computers, networking devices, and home electronic equipment. The system enables users to protect their work by saving it during power outages while they can safely shut down their equipment.

key_specs:
• Capacity: 800 VA / 480 W

description: The Compact Liebert itON 800VA UPS protects computers and sensitive electronics through its line-interactive technology and automatic voltage regulation feature, which safeguards against power outages, surges, and voltage fluctuations, enabling users to save their work and complete a safe shutdown process.

• Outlets: Battery‑backup + surge‑protected sockets

description: The APC Easy UPS SMV 750VA is a compact and dependable uninterruptible power supply designed to protect PCs, networking equipment, and home electronics from power outages, surges, and voltage fluctuations. It provides battery backup power to keep devices running long enough to save data and safely shut down.

key_specs:

• Input/Output Voltage: 230 V AC

description: The Liebert PSI 1000VA UPS functions as a dependable line-interactive uninterruptible power supply that safeguards computers and networking equipment and delicate electronic devices from power failures, electrical surges, and voltage changes. The system provides strong backup power through its 1000 VA/900 W capacity, while its automatic voltage regulation system extends operational time during power outages.

key_specs:
• Rated Power: 3.5 kVA / 3500 W (approx.)
• DC Input Voltage: 24 V
• Output Voltage: 230 VAC ±5%
• Output Frequency: 50/60 Hz
• Waveform: Pure/modified sine wave (model‑dependent)
• Efficiency: High conversion efficiency (typically >90%)
• Protections: Overload, short‑circuit, low battery, and overvoltage protections
• Applications: Backup power for lights, TVs, computers, refrigerators, and small appliances from 24 V battery systems (solar or grid backup)
description: The 3.5 kVA inverter produces 24 V DC power to deliver consistent 230 V AC electricity, which can be used in residential, commercial, and solar energy systems. The system functions as an excellent solution to supply power for appliances, lights, and electronic devices during power outages or when operating from remote locations.

key_specs:
• Capacity: 15 kVA / 12 000 W load protection
• UPS Topology: Double‑conversion online for pure sine‑wave output
• Input Voltage: Hard‑wire three‑phase (5‑wire) (configurable)
• Output Voltage: 120 V / 208 V / 220 V (varies by setup)
• Frequency: 50/60 Hz tolerance
• Runtime: 18 min at full load; 45 min at half load with standard batteries
• Battery Type: Sealed Lead‑Acid (VRLA), hot‑swappable modules
• Management: Network management via SNMP/Web, SmartSlot, LCD console
• Bypass: Internal maintenance and static bypass
• Features: Emergency Power Off (EPO), scalable runtime, dual mains input
• Use Case: Ideal for servers, networking gear, data centers, and mission‑critical electronics needing high‑availability power protection.
description: The APC Smart‑UPS VT 15kVA functions as a three‑phase online UPS system, which provides high-capacity power protection for essential IT operations and small data centers and industrial power protection needs. The system delivers an uninterrupted power supply through its advanced management features, which enable users to extend operational time during power failures and system interruptions.

key_specs:

description: A compact and dependable uninterruptible power supply system protects computers and electronic devices from both power failures and voltage spikes while it delivers backup electricity to preserve work progress and safely power down equipment.
